name: Gyazo
description: List and retrieve a user's saved Gyazo captures, inspect the authenticated profile, and search capture metadata and OCR text.

auth.hint: Register an application in the Gyazo developer dashboard, generate or obtain an OAuth 2.0 access token, and send it in the Authorization header as a Bearer token.

tools.name: list_images
tools.description: List captures saved by the authenticated Gyazo user.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Captures per page from 1 to 100; defaults to 20.

tools.name: get_image
tools.description: Get one saved Gyazo capture and its available metadata and OCR information.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get the authenticated Gyazo user's profile.

tools.name: search_images
tools.description: Search the authenticated user's saved Gyazo captures; this operation requires Gyazo Pro.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query with a maximum length of 200 characters.

params.name: per
params.description: Results per page, up to 100; defaults to 20.
